# Phase Shift Plus Interpolation

**Summary**: A migration technique that uses a set of reference velocities to extrapolate the wavefield in the frequency-wavenumber domain.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-mohammed|Mohammed, 2015]] modified the PSPI algorithm to include visco-acoustic compensation for absorption.

## Key Results and Findings

- The modified PSPI successfully compensated for energy loss by incorporating a complex term into the extrapolator. ([[2015-mohammed|Mohammed, 2015, p. 61]])
